final:
module RefModule (
        input a,
        input b,
        input c,
        input d,
  wire temp1_( ~a & ~b & ~c & ~d ) |
           ( ~a & ~b & c & ~d ) |
           ( ~a & b & ~c & ~d ) |
           ( ~a & b & c & ~d ) |
           ( a & ~b & ~c & d ) |
           ( a & ~b & c & d ) |
           ( a & b & ~c & d ) = ( ~a & ~b & ~c & ~d ) |
           ( ~a & ~b & c & ~d ) |
           ( ~a & b & ~c & ~d ) |
           ( ~a & b & c & ~d ) |
           ( a & ~b & ~c & d ) |
           ( a & ~b & c & d ) |
           ( a & b & ~c & d );
  wire temp2_( a & b & c & d ) = ( a & b & c & d );
  assign f = temp1_( ~a & ~b & ~c & ~d ) |
           ( ~a & ~b & c & ~d ) |
           ( ~a & b & ~c & ~d ) |
           ( ~a & b & c & ~d ) |
           ( a & ~b & ~c & d ) |
           ( a & ~b & c & d ) |
           ( a & b & ~c & d ) | temp2_( a & b & c & d ) ;

endmodule
